summary: This is an extremely brief post, essentially a one-liner sharing a humorous screenshot from FogBugz's sample bug database. Joel links to an image of a sample bug report that contains an amusing complaint about 'Programmer Longhair's attitude.' The post serves as light entertainment and indirect promotion of FogBugz, Fog Creek's bug tracking product.
key_points: Joel shares a humorous example from FogBugz's sample bug database
The post serves as subtle product marketing through entertainment
It highlights how sample data in developer tools can have personality and humor
money_quotes: I would just like to say that Programmer Longhair's attitude is quite inappropriate…
key_insight: Even sample data in developer tools can be an opportunity for personality and subtle product promotion.
